top_signals.title: Cement, Textile Stocks Biggest Winners From Pakistan Budget
top_signals.summary: The government’s move to lower taxes on certain sectors including cement and textiles is likely to support related shares as Pakistan looks to balance growth and compliance with its promises to the International Monetary Fund.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
